episode.title: MTG Fast Finance: Phyrexia All Will Be One Final Reveals
episode.description: Cliff rejoins James on cast to dive in on all the latest MTGFinance news including the weekly Meta Analysis, Fast Movers, Cards to Watch and notes on the latest Phyrexia: All Will Be One card reveals.
